summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Webenablix accessibility platform. All backend APIs (13/13 tests passed) and frontend features working correctly. Widget with 8 profiles and 5 tabs functional. Free Checker returns audit scores.

ui_bugs.issue: Widget button click blocked by 'Made with Emergent' badge overlay - requires force=True or JavaScript click

seed_data_creation: Created test leads and contacts with TEST_ prefix during API testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working. Backend uses MOCKED audit data (random scores generated). Widget button may need force=True click due to Emergent badge overlay.

test_results.widget_button_present: PASS - Present on all pages tested
test_results.accessibility_profiles: PASS - All 8 profiles work (Vision Impaired, Color Blind, Dyslexia Friendly, ADHD Friendly, Cognitive, Motor Impaired, Seizure Safe, Screen Reader)
test_results.widget_tabs: PASS - All 5 tabs work (Profiles, Content, Visual, Navigation, Audio)
test_results.font_size_adjustment: PASS - Visible in Content tab with slider
test_results.dark_mode_toggle: PASS - Visible in Visual tab, toggles correctly
test_results.backend_api_root: PASS - Returns 'Webenablix API v2.0 is running'
test_results.backend_audit_endpoint: PASS - Returns scores for accessibility, SEO, performance, mobile, security
test_results.pricing_page: PASS - Loads correctly with pricing plans
test_results.free_checker_page: PASS - URL input works, displays audit results with scores

mocked_apis.note: Backend /api/audit returns MOCKED accessibility audit data with randomly generated scores and issues
